##### April 22–24, 2026

Mandalay Bay Convention Center, Las Vegas

# Where big ideas become a reality

[Register now](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/fb-register?i=tthUrchTpZjedx-_avOXb4xsnSHzn8-3 "Register")

[View pricing](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/plan-your-trip#pricing)

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/6535656-6996508fde121.gif)

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/5954830-68ec4f8f1463c.png)

## Next has something for everyone.

#### Stay ahead of the curve

Get a sneak peek into some of the latest advancements in AI and cloud tech.

[Relive some of the highlights from Next ‘25](https://youtu.be/OIJywyYQrd8)

#### Connect with innovators

Join a global community of leaders, thinkers, and doers to share ideas.

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/5760640-68c08db931fbe.png)

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/5944492-68e7ea067e960.png)

#### Dive into your favorite topics

Immerse yourself in three full days of back-to-back lightning talks, interactive demos, guided workshops, and more.

### **The Next at Night lineup**

Pop's biggest breakout meets rock royalty: [**Benson Boone**](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/speaker/2261024/benson-boone) and [**Weezer**](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/speaker/2261047/weezer) are ready to celebrate with you.

If you're already registered, your Next ticket gets you into Allegiant Stadium on April 23, and you can add a guest (21 and over) to join the party.

[Register now](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/fb-register?i=tthUrchTpZjedx-_avOXb4xsnSHzn8-3 "Register")

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/6778133-69cd51d6c9d0d.png)

If you're already registered, your Next ticket gets you into Allegiant Stadium on April 23, and you can add a guest (21 and over) to join the party.

[Register now](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/fb-register?i=tthUrchTpZjedx-_avOXb4xsnSHzn8-3 "Register")

![](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/full/6778133-69cd51d6c9d0d.png)

## A guide to Google Cloud Next content

##### Stay informed

![5429372-684280803a503.svg](https://assets.swoogo.com/uploads/5429372-684280803a503.svg) Keynotes

General sessions for all audiences, featuring Google Cloud executives and industry luminaries who will share news and inspiring content.

- location\_on
Main Stage

- av\_timer
60-90 min

- groups
Large capacity

- calendar\_clock Plan ahead, arrive early

flare
Spotlights


Solution-focused, keynote-style sessions delivered by Google leadership and our partners, showcasing new innovations, live demos, and customers driving tangible impact.

- location\_on
Spotlight stages

- av\_timer
45 min

- groups
Large capacity

- calendar\_clock Book in advance

category
Breakouts


Lecture-style sessions where you’ll get deep-dive presentations from experts and a chance to get your questions answered.

- location\_on
Breakout rooms

- live\_help
Q&A included

- av\_timer
45 min

- groups
Large capacity

- calendar\_clock Book in advance

electric\_bolt Lightning Talks

Short theater presentations dedicated to a specific customer story, partner solution, or technical use case, with a strong focus on practical takeaways.

- location\_on Expo Theaters, Developer Theater, and Customer Theater
- av\_timer 20 min
- groups Large capacity
- calendar\_clock Book in advance

##### Build skills

rocket
Solution Talks


Highly interactive technical sessions starting with a short lecture to set the stage, then diving straight into real-world architecture challenges.


- live\_help
Q&A included

- av\_timer
45 min

- group
Medium capacity

- calendar\_clock Book in advance

construction
Skills Zone Workshops


Work, test, and create directly with Google instructors, and get up close and personal with the tech you need to sharpen your skills.


- av\_timer
45 min

- group
Medium capacity

- calendar\_clock Book in advance
- code
Best for developers


wand\_stars Showcase Demos

Whether you want to witness real-world AI innovation through experiential stories, find inspiration at our interactive screens, or build and test your own projects, there’s a demo for every skill level.

- location\_on Google Cloud Showcase on the Expo floor
- groupsLarge capacity

##### Grow your network

forum
Discussion Groups


A great follow-up to a breakout. They’re led by experts, but designed for the group – come tackle complex topics, swap practical tips, and network
in a relaxed environment.


- live\_help
Q&A included

- av\_timer
30 min

- person
Small capacity

- calendar\_clock Book in advance

New

data\_object
Developer Meetup


A dedicated space for the developer community to mingle and discuss relevant tech trends.

- person
Small capacity

- code
Best for developers


raven
Birds of a Feather

Want to talk shop? These are informal hangouts tailored specifically to your role or industry, so you can connect with peers facing the same
challenges as you.


- location\_on
Lunch Café – Level 2

- av\_timer
30 min

- person
Small capacity

Come chat in a casual, low-pressure setting with experts who know the tech best.

- location\_on
Community Lounge and



Startup Hub

## Get your ticket

Lock in the best price for your ticket. The earlier you register, the more you’ll save.

[Plan your trip](https://www.googlecloudevents.com/next-vegas/plan-your-trip)

metadata.og:description: Join us for Google Cloud Next 2026 in Las Vegas. Explore the latest in generative AI, infrastructure, and security. Register now for the year's premier cloud event.
